title: selago distans
intro: Selago distans, also known as Blue Eyed Daisy or Blue Eyed Maud, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selago distans include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
